sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47949" key="qauma/tourgqe" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θαυμᾰ´τουργ-θε</orth>, inseparable suffix, <sense id="n47949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-θεν</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
